destinations.evidence: AsyncEthEvmContext wraps EthEvmContext and implements AsyncContextTr when the async-context feature is enabled, giving precompiles access to the configured async execution context.
The factory associated context type is AsyncEthEvmContext and both creation paths build RitualEvm around that context.

equivalence_argument: The EVM factory is specialized to AsyncEthEvmContext, and that context exposes AsyncContextTr under async-context; this is the behavior async precompiles need to read and mutate the async execution context.
notes: Mapped in nodebuilder, which owns the Ritual EVM factory.
rationale: The primary commit adds AsyncEthEvmContext, implements ContextTr, ContextSetters, and async-context-gated AsyncContextTr for it, switches RitualEvmFactory's Context and Evm associated types to the async-aware context, and registers the new module in the node crate. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: RitualEvmFactory must create EVM instances whose context type is AsyncEthEvmContext and, when the async-context feature is enabled, that context must implement AsyncContextTr so async precompiles can access the configured async execution context.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build the node with async-context enabled, create an EVM through RitualEvmFactory with an AsyncExecutionContext installed on AsyncEthEvmContext, execute a transaction that invokes an async-context-dependent precompile, and assert that the precompile can read and mutate the same async execution context; also assert that replacing the factory context with EthEvmContext fails to compile or fails the precompile access path.
summary: RitualEvmFactory creates EVMs with AsyncEthEvmContext and async-context support.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build nodebuilder with async-context and assert a RitualEvmFactory-created EVM exposes AsyncContextTr before invoking an async-context-dependent precompile.
title: Node EVMs expose async context
